max._comment_dmPolicy: Options: 'allowlist' (only users in allowFrom) or 'open' (anyone can write)
max._comment_whisperModel: Options: tiny | base | small | medium. small is recommended.
max._comment_whisperBin: Path to whisper CLI. If installed via pip, usually just 'whisper'. Or use full path like '/usr/local/bin/whisper'

_instructions.step1: Copy this file content into ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json (merge with existing config)
_instructions.step4: Send a message to your MAX bot to find your user_id
_instructions.step5: Add your user_id to allowFrom above
_instructions.findUserId: Run: openclaw gateway logs | grep Inbound | tail -5
